title: Nourishing Breakfast
description: Hot ragi malt, milk, oatmeal, and fresh organic fruits to kickstart the day with good nutrition.

title: Healthy Balanced Lunch
description: Full Indian thali with wheat rotis, dal, mixed vegetable subzi, steamed rice, and fresh curd.

title: Evening Tea & Snacks
description: Warm herbal tea served with digestive biscuits, roasted pulses, or light puffed rice.

title: Daily Vitals Screening
description: Monitoring blood pressure, blood glucose levels, temperature, and oxygen saturation by nursing staff.

title: Physiotherapy & Mobility
description: Guided sessions with physiotherapists to perform gentle stretching, joint mobility, and walking support.

title: Doctor Consultations
description: Visits by senior geriatric physicians for comprehensive health checkups, medicine review, and care adjustment.

title: Yoga & Meditation
description: Light breathing exercises (pranayama), chair yoga, and guided mindfulness sessions for mental peace.

title: Interactive Board Games
description: Playing chess, carrom, and memory puzzle games to stimulate cognitive health and enjoy social company.

title: Gardening & Storytelling
description: Tending to the herb garden, sharing life stories, reciting poetry, and playing classic group music.
